description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular structure with a dark, gabled roof and a brick facade. The front side is characterized by multiple balconies, each with white railings, and a series of evenly spaced windows, giving the building a modern and orderly appearance. The rear of the building opens onto a large parking lot with marked spaces, bordered by low walls and a small patch of grass. The side views reveal the building's depth and the extension of balconies along the length, as well as the continuation of the brickwork and roofline. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the main entrance is located at the front, accessible from the street. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, brick apartment building with a dark gabled roof, multiple balconies, and a rear parking lot. Symmetrical windows and a clean, functional design define its urban residential character.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with balconies, white railings, and a series of windows, as well as the main entrance.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the building, the gabled roof, and the extension of balconies along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a large parking lot with marked spaces, rear windows, and a small grassy area.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the building's length, side balconies, and the continuation of the roof and brickwork.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with consistent spacing and alignment across all visible facades.
